---
title: 'Las Colinas Irving Texas'
date: '2014-05-17T13:36:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'LIFE in Review (s)'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '853384945153892509'
blogger_filename: '/2014/05/las-colinas-irving-texas.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/LIFE in Review (s)/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Discover'
---

<h3><a href="http://goo.gl/maps/ZwOuL" target="_blank">Las Colinas Area</a>&nbsp;<a href="http://www.ci.irving.tx.us/" target="_blank">Irving, Texas</a></h3><br /><iframe frameborder="0" height="200" marginheight="0" marginwidth="0" scrolling="no" src="https://maps.google.com/maps?client=opera&amp;oe=UTF-8&amp;q=las+colinas+dallas+county&amp;ie=UTF8&amp;hq=&amp;hnear=Las+Colinas,+Irving,+Dallas+County,+Texas&amp;gl=us&amp;ll=32.892328,-96.948726&amp;spn=0.044253,0.079222&amp;t=h&amp;z=14&amp;output=embed" width="300"></iframe><br /><small><a href="https://maps.google.com/maps?client=opera&amp;oe=UTF-8&amp;q=las+colinas+dallas+county&amp;ie=UTF8&amp;hq=&amp;hnear=Las+Colinas,+Irving,+Dallas+County,+Texas&amp;gl=us&amp;ll=32.892328,-96.948726&amp;spn=0.044253,0.079222&amp;t=h&amp;z=14&amp;source=embed" style="color: blue; text-align: left;">View Larger Map</a></small><br /><br /><br /><h4>Overview</h4><br />Las Colinas is a development within the larger city of Irving. But it's not just a development. It's a city within a city. I wouldn't be surprised if it becomes it's own separate city. I met two guys that live in Las Colinas and didn't know that it was the "City of Irving".<br /><br /><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Las_Colinas" target="_blank">Wiki </a>Expounds:<br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><i><b style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.399999618530273px;">Las Colinas</b><span style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.399999618530273px;">&nbsp;is an upscale, developed area in the&nbsp;</span><a class="mw-redirect" href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dallas,_Texas" style="background-color: white; background-image: none; color: #0b0080; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.399999618530273px; text-decoration: none;" title="Dallas, Texas">Dallas</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.399999618530273px;">&nbsp;suburb of&nbsp;</span><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Irving,_Texas" style="background-color: white; background-image: none; color: #0b0080; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.399999618530273px; text-decoration: none;" title="Irving, Texas">Irving, Texas</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.399999618530273px;">. Due to its central location between Dallas and&nbsp;</span><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fort_Worth,_Texas" style="background-color: white; background-image: none; color: #0b0080; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.399999618530273px; text-decoration: none;" title="Fort Worth, Texas">Fort Worth</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.399999618530273px;">&nbsp;and its proximity to&nbsp;</span><a class="mw-redirect" href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dallas-Fort_Worth_International_Airport" style="background-color: white; background-image: none; color: #0b0080; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.399999618530273px; text-decoration: none;" title="Dallas-Fort Worth International Airport">DFW Airport</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.399999618530273px;">, Las Colinas has been a viable place in the&nbsp;</span><a class="mw-redirect" href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dallas/Fort_Worth_Metroplex" style="background-color: white; background-image: none; color: #0b0080; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.399999618530273px; text-decoration: none;" title="Dallas/Fort Worth Metroplex">Metroplex</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.399999618530273px;">&nbsp;for corporate and business relocation. As a planned community, it has many corporate offices, luxury hotels, landmark office towers, luxury townhomes, distinguished single-family homes, private country clubs, gated enclaves and urban lofts.</span></i></blockquote><br />What I have found is that as I looked for jobs this community of Las Colinas would come up over, and over, and over. No wonder. There are more office buildings here in one location than anywhere else in the DFW area (except for downtown Dallas and Fort Worth). The difference is that these office buildings don't make you feel like you are in "DownTown" at all. It's a very impressive area, beautiful landscapes.<br /><br />I did, in fact, end up getting a job here which is why I decided to write about it today.<br /><br /><br />Food and Fun. There are MANY restaurants throughout Las Colinas. You typical Fast Food chains, like <a href="http://goo.gl/maps/e9dzf" target="_blank">In-N-Out Burger</a>, can mostly be found up and down MacArthur Blvd.<br /><br />It seems that much of the real attraction is found around <a href="http://goo.gl/maps/xKxrZ" target="_blank">Lake Carolyn</a>. In order to keep up with events you can check out their Twitter Feed&nbsp;<complete id="goog_1252378234"><a href="https://twitter.com/lascolinastex" target="_blank">@LasColinasTex</a> or <a href="https://www.facebook.com/lascolinastex" target="_blank">Facebook.Com/LasColinasTex</a>.&nbsp;</complete><br /><h4>The APT People Mover - Unique Travel</h4><br />I haven't used it yet, but I found the <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Las_Colinas_APT_System" target="_blank">APT System</a> intriguing. It is a people mover on a raised rail, akin to the <a href="https://disneyland.disney.go.com/attractions/disneyland/disneyland-monorail/" target="_blank">Disney Monorail</a>. (Special Thanks to Walt Disney for having this vision!)<br /><br />It moves from<br /><br /><table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody><tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="http://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/0/0b/Las_Colinas_APT.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" src="http://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/0/0b/Las_Colinas_APT.jpg" height="240" width="320" /></a></td></tr><tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;"><a href="http://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/0/0b/Las_Colinas_APT.jpg" target="_blank">http://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/0/0b/Las_Colinas_APT.jpg</a></td></tr></tbody></table><table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody><tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="http://www.dart.org/images/stations/aptmap.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" src="http://www.dart.org/images/stations/aptmap.jpg" height="275" width="400" /></a></td></tr><tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;"><a href="http://www.dart.org/riding/stations/lascolinasaptsystem.asp" target="_blank">http://www.dart.org/riding/stations/lascolinasaptsystem.asp</a></td></tr></tbody></table><div style="text-align: center;"><br /></div><div style="text-align: center;"><iframe allowfullscreen="" frameborder="0" height="281" src="//www.youtube.com/embed/KtABnF158Gg" width="500"></iframe></div><div style="text-align: center;"><br /></div><div style="text-align: center;"><a href="http://youtu.be/KtABnF158Gg" target="_blank">http://youtu.be/KtABnF158Gg</a></div><div style="text-align: center;"><br /></div><br /><br /><h4>Cost</h4>Living In Las Colinas could range from affordable to expensive. They have Apartments and Lofts for those on a budget. They have private Country Clubs for those with a bit more expendable income.<br /><br />Dining In Las Colinas again, could range. They have everything from In-N-Out Burger and McDonalds to the <a href="http://www.urbanspoon.com/r/13/162239/restaurant/Cool-River-Cafe-Irving" target="_blank">Cool River Cafe (Fine Dining)</a>. Check Out Urban Spoons "<a href="http://www.urbanspoon.com/tn/13/5/1222/Dallas-Fort-Worth/Romantic/Irving-restaurants" target="_blank">Irving Romantic Restaurants</a>" list and/or <a href="http://www.yelp.com/search?find_desc=&amp;find_loc=Las+Colinas%2C+TX&amp;ns=1&amp;ls=6ffd592a9ae4cc68" target="_blank">Yelp </a>for more ideas.<br /><br /><h4>Kids</h4>I haven't done this yet... But my kids used to love the Disney Monorail. I'm thinking of taking a trip on the Free APT just for fun, and then doing some more exploring.<br /><br /><h4>Tips to enjoy it better...</h4>There is one thing I can tell you now. Use GPS! I've been turned around nearly every time I came here, thinking I was headed north and I was going east, etc, etc.<br /><br />The 161 and 114 both got a bit confusing too because they are turning direction right through the area. So take your GPS with you, or a GOOD up to date map.<br /><br /><h4>Final Thoughts</h4>This is an area you could live, work, eat, play. If there was ONE are that everything you needed, and quick access through two freeways to the other places you want to go, this would be it. If I wasn't already a home owner I'd consider this area myself.<br /><br /><h4><b>Life In Fort Worth By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></b></h4><h4>Blog Connect:</h4><ul><li><a href="http://www.lifeinfortworth.com/" target="_blank">www.LifeInFortWorth.com</a></li><li><a href="https://www.facebook.com/LifeInFortWorth" target="_blank">Facebook.Com/LifeInFortWorth</a></li><li><a href="http://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe" target="_blank">Twitter.Com/DarrellWolfe</a></li><li><a href="https://plus.google.com/b/103906191345996094295/+LifeInFortWorthBlog/posts" target="_blank">Google+ LifeInFortWorth</a></li><li>Flickr:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.flickr.com/photos/darrellwolfe/sets/72157639481468746/" target="_blank">LIF Master Set</a></li><li>Urban Spoon:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.urbanspoon.com/br/13/6359/life-in-fort-worth-dallas-fort-worth" target="_blank">Life In Fort Worth</a></li><li>Yelp:&nbsp;<a href="http://lifeinwortworth.yelp.com/" target="_blank">LifeInFortWorth.Yelp.Com</a></li></ul><h4>Connect:</h4><div style="clear: both; float: left; padding-bottom: 10px;"><a href="https://www.facebook.com/DarrellGWolfe" imageanchor="1"><img alt="Follow me on Facebook" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/facebook-icon-436ed0b74b58.png" style="border: 0px; height: 32px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 32px;" />&nbsp;</a><a href="https://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe"><img alt="Follow  &lt;b&gt;YOUR-TWITTER-ACCOUNT-NAME&lt;/b&gt; on Twitter" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/twitter-logo-0d130abda9d2.png" style="border: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" />&nbsp;</a><a href="http://www.youtube.com/user/darrellgwolfe"><img alt="Follow YOUR-CHANNEL-ID on YouTube" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/youtube-icon-df42b17a5900.jpg" style="border: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" />&nbsp;</a><a href="http://feeds.feedburner.com/TexasLivingInfo" rel="alternate" type="application/rss+xml"><img alt="RSS subscription icon" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/rss-logo-d57cc3305733.jpg" style="border: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" />&nbsp;</a>&nbsp;&nbsp; </div><br /><br /><h4>Disclaimers<b>:</b></h4><i>* This information is AS IS. I make no assumptions to know everything, or be up to date. I am a fellow traveler passing on what I learn to you. If you need official assistance from a professional, please get that help from them.&nbsp;</i><br /><i><br /></i><i>*Affiliate Links may be included. In some instances I make money from the reviews of products or services I do here. In some cases I get a few freebies as well. Nevertheless, I only leave my honest reviews. This is how I see it. They can pay me to review, they can't pay me for how my review turns out. Please see my full disclosure list at:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.lifeinfortworth.com/p/about.html" target="_blank">Start Here - About</a>.&nbsp;</i><br /><br /><div></div><br /><h4 style="-webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; letter-spacing: normal; line-height: normal; orphans: auto; text-align: start; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; white-space: normal; widows: auto; word-spacing: 0px;"><b>What is YOUR favorite place to go? Comment Below!</b></h4><br />
